channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: McGrath celebrates first-run lead in World Cup slalom with signature Cuche ski flip
item.description: Atle Lie McGrath races to fastest time in the first run of a World Cup slalom then pays tribute to a Swiss great with a signature ski flip.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Coco Gauff drops a set but reaches the Australian Open quarterfinals. Sabalenka wins, too
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Coco Gauff's consecutive-set streak ended at the Australian Open. Her bid for a second Grand Slam title continued on Sunday with a 5-7, 6-2, 6-1 comeback victory over Belinda Bencic in the fourth round.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alexander Zverev returns to the Australian Open quarterfinals and faces Tommy Paul next
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — No. 2 seed Alexander Zverev reached the Australian Open quarterfinals for the fourth time by beating No. 14 Ugo Humbert 6-1, 2-6, 6-3, 6-2 with the help of 19 aces and a 43-23 advantage in total winners on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Coco Gauff writes 'RIP TikTok USA' on a TV camera at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — American tennis star Coco Gauff mourned the loss of TikTok's app back home, writing on a TV camera lens “RIP TikTok USA” and drawing a broken heart right after winning a match at the Australian Open to reach the quarterfinals.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Islam Makhachev submits late-replacement Renato Moicano in 1st round at UFC 311
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Lightweight champion Islam Makhachev submitted 10th-ranked Renato Moicano at 4:05 of the first round Saturday night at UFC 311 for his 15th straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Turnovers and depleted defense contribute to top-seeded Lions' quick playoff exit
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — The Detroit Lions had everything set up the way they wanted this time. After losing last season's NFC championship game at San Francisco, they went 15-2 to earn the NFC's top seed.
item.dc:creator: DAVE HOGG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Keller's four points leads Utah past St. Louis, 4-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Clayton Keller had a goal and three assists to help the Utah Hockey Club defeat the St. Louis Blues 4-2 at Delta Center on Saturday. Logan Cooley had a goal and two assists, and Connor Ingram made 22 saves for Utah (19-19-7), which had lost three straight.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Texans' Kris Boyd flings helmet, gets penalized and then shoves his coach on first play vs. Chiefs
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Texans cornerback Kris Boyd nearly shoved Houston special teams coach Frank Ross to the ground after the opening kickoff of their divisional playoff loss to the Kansas City Chiefs on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bertuzzi, Jones help Blackhawks beat slumping Golden Knights 5-3
item.description: Tyler Bertuzzi scored two power-play goals and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the slumping Vegas Golden Knights 5-3 on Saturday night to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jayden Daniels and the Commanders stun the top-seeded Lions 45-31 to reach NFC title game
item.description: Jayden Daniels threw for two touchdowns in a flawless performance by Washington’s dazzling rookie, and the Commanders stunned the Detroit Lions 45-31 to reach the NFC championship game for the first time since winning the Super Bowl 33 years ago.
item.dc:creator: Larry Lage, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Stephen Curry scores 26 before leaving with ankle injury as Warriors beat Wizards 122-114
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry scored 26 points before leaving the game with an ankle injury in the final minute as the Golden State Warriors beat the Washington Wizards 122-114 Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIC HE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mahomes and Kelce help Chiefs to a 23-14 win over Texans and another AFC title game trip
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes has never lost in the divisional round of the playoffs with the Kansas City Chiefs. The Houston Texans still have never won.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: West Virginia celebrates the life of NBA great Jerry West at sellout game with No. 2 Iowa State
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.Va. (AP) — West Virginia celebrated the life of NBA great Jerry West, the school's all-time leading scorer, at its sellout game Saturday against No. 2 Iowa State, and announced at halftime that his No. 44 would be retired across all sports at the university.
item.dc:creator: JOHN RABY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Neal scores career-high 24 and Creighton snaps No. 14 UConn's 28-game home winning streak, 68-63
item.description: STORRS, Conn. (AP) — Jamiya Neal had a career-high 24 points to help Creighton snap UConn's 28-game home winning streak with a 68-63 victory on Saturday. The 14th-ranked Huskies hadn't lost at home since an 82-79 loss on Jan. 25, 2023, to then-No. 13 Xavier.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Taylor Swift reportedly gives gift to Brittany Mahomes' newborn daughter days before Trump takes office
item.description: Taylor Swift has reportedly gifted Brittany Mahomes a hand-made baby blanket to celebrate Mahomes' newborn daughter, Golden Raye.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blackhawks take losing streak into game against the Golden Knights
item.description: Vegas Golden Knights (29-13-3, in the Pacific Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (14-28-3, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: California pals Tien, 19, and Michelsen, 20, are 2 of 4 US men in the Australian Open's 4th round
item.description: Two friends from California, Learner Tien and Alex Michelsen, have both reached the fourth round at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dispute centered around rev-sharing leads to Xavier Lucas leaving Wisconsin for Miami
item.description: Wisconsin Badgers defensive back Xavier Lucas made the unprecedented decision to join the Miami Hurricanes football program without going through the transfer portal
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ball and Bridges lead Hornets to wild 125-123 win over Bulls
item.description: LaMelo Ball scored 26 points, Miles Bridges had 21 and the Charlotte Hornets held on for a wild 125-123 win over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah Valley wins on overtime buzzer-beater, 85-83
item.description: ARLINGTON, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Texas native Kylin Green went the full length of the floor in five seconds and dished to Jackson Holcombe, who scored in the final second of overtime to lift Utah Valley to a thrilling 85-83 road victory over UT Arlington on Thursday night at College Park Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Rancho Buena Vista 63, La Costa Canyon 61
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI- Fantastic hoops game on Wednesday night with Rancho Buena Vista edging La Costa Canyon 63-61.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Girls Basketball: Rancho Buena Vista 56, La Costa Canyon 51
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Girls Basketball on Wednesday evening part of girls and boys doubleheader for league action. Camille Dake, Senior from RBV lead the way for the Longhorns. Great game that ended with the home team winning 56-51.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego Clippers Hometown Big Man
item.description: "It's honestly one of the more beautiful full circle moments I could've asked for." said the 6'11" Center Cisse.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Wisconsin nonprofit receives money to curb human trafficking during NFL draft
item.description: 'Awaken' officials, the local nonprofit receiving this money, said this is a great win for the whole community.
item.dc:creator: Paul Steeno, NewsNation

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Jack Vig Joins Elite Club with 1,000-Point Milestone
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Plateau Valley High School senior Jack Vig recently reached a milestone few high school basketball players achieve — a 1,000-point career “It just felt like another two points for my career. It wasn’t a big deal for me.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Bob Uecker, colorful comedian and Baseball Hall of Famer, dies
item.description: From his time as a backup catcher to appearances on Johnny Carson's late night show to his more than five decades in the broadcast booth, people far and wide knew Bob Uecker.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WFLA, NBC

item.title: South Side native Katie Schumacher-Cawley coaches PSU to national v-ball title while undergoing cancer treatment
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky./CHICAGO (AP, WGN) — Katie Schumacher-Cawley, a native of the Mount Greenwood neighborhood on Chicago's South Side, is an NCAA national champion — for a second time. But there's so much inspiration to her story beyond just winning on the court.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utah Royals have busy offseason with massive roster overhaul
item.description: The Utah Royals have had a busy offseason. There have been departures and additions galore, as the team continues to try to improve before the 2025 NWSL season with the goal of making playoffs for the first time.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4

item.title: Keyonte George returns, but Jazz lose to Hornets, 117-112
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Down three starters, the Utah Jazz young players are getting a chance to shine these days. After playing very well for three quarters, the Jazz ran out of gas in the fourth and lost to the Charlotte Hornets Wednesday night, 117-112.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Patriots introduce Mike Vrabel as new head coach
item.description: The New England Patriots are set to formally introduce Mike Vrabel as the team's 16th head coach in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Clippers, Lakers to resume their wildfire-delayed schedules on Monday
item.description: NBA games are scheduled to return to wildfire-ravaged Los Angeles on Monday night, with the Clippers planning to resume their schedule when they host the Miami Heat and the Lakers set to host Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5
